nasb.text: There were no Anakim left in the land of the sons of Israel; only in Gaza, in Gath, and in Ashdod some remained.

esv.text: There was none of the Anakim left in the land of the people of Israel. Only in Gaza, in Gath, and in Ashdod did some remain.

cnv.text: 在以色列人的境內，沒有留下一個亞衲族人，只在迦薩、迦特和亞實突還有餘下的。

ccb.text: 除了在迦萨、迦特和亚实突有一些残余之外，以色列境内没有亚衲人了。
